zh-cn.kojo_default_com_job_farm_cultivate_crop: $self$："种田啊…… 要不你找个更有经验的？"
$self$："一起种田？ 还是算了吧, 我怕我会拖你后腿"
"这苗是不是埋得太浅了点？" $self$看着歪歪扭扭的幼苗，忍不住皱起了眉头
"……算了，就这样吧，反正能长出来就行。" $self$看着参差不齐的田地叹了口气
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Begin_1: $self$眼睛一亮，立刻站了起来。"好啊！我早就想种种看了！"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Begin_2: $self$兴奋地挽起袖子："走走走，我也来露一手！"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Begin_3: $self$脸色发白，颤抖着点了点头。"我、我知道了……我会照做的。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Begin_4: $self$不敢反抗，只能僵硬地跟在后面。"请别生气，我去就是了。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Begin_5: $self$有些意外地指了指自己。"诶？我也要来吗？好吧，既然你都邀请了。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Begin_6: $self$犹豫了一下，还是接过了递来的工具。"我可不保证能种活哦。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Begin_7: $self$带上了沾着泥土的手套，拿起小铲子走向预留的空地。
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Begin_8: $self$将买来的种子包装袋撕开，小心翼翼地倒在手心里数了数。
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Begin_9: $self$深吸了一口花园里泥土的芬芳，挽起袖子准备大干一场。
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Begin_10: $self$蹲下身子，用手指试探了一下土壤的湿度。"嗯，今天是个种植的好日子。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Begin_11: $self$把沉重的肥料袋拖到了脚边，拍了拍手上的灰尘。
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Tryjoin_1: $self$看着忙碌的$target$，试探性地问道："那个……需要帮忙吗？我也想试试。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Tryjoin_2: $self$凑了过去，一脸期待。"看起来很有趣的样子，加我一个呗？"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Joined_1: $self$开心地接过铲子。"太棒了！我一定不会拖后腿的！"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Joined_2: $self$立马蹲下身，干劲十足。"那我负责这边这一块！"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Join_Refused: $self$失落地垂下肩膀。"啊……好吧，那我自己在旁边看着总行吧？"
$self$有些尴尬地收回手。"不让帮忙就算了，真小气。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Join_1: $self$感激地笑了笑："不用啦，我自己能搞定，而且这本来就是我想一个人静静做的事。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Join_2: $self$挡住了对方的手："小心弄脏衣服，你在旁边陪我说话就好啦。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Join_3: $self$警惕地护住自己的苗圃。"别碰！这是我的实验田，不需要外人插手。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Join_4: $self$冷冷地说道："你只会越帮越忙，离远点。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Join_5: $self$惊喜地递过一副备用手套。"求之不得！两个人干活肯定快多了！"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Join_6: $self$往旁边挪了挪位置。"来来来，这个坑归你挖！"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Join_7: $self$身体僵硬地往旁边缩了缩，没敢出声反对。
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Join_8: $self$低下头默默让出了位置，眼神中闪烁着不安。"你想怎么样都行……"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Join_9: $self$愣了一下，随即耸耸肩。"如果你坚持的话……只要别嫌累就行。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Join_10: $self$把铲子分了一半出去。"那就麻烦你了？其实挺枯燥的。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Ongoing_1: $self$正专注地用铲子松动着板结的土壤，额头上渗出了细密的汗珠。
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Ongoing_2: $self$哼着不知名的小调，将一株株幼苗小心地移入挖好的坑中。
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Ongoing_3: $self$跪在泥土上，细心地将多余的杂草拔除，动作轻柔得像在抚摸宠物。
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Ongoing_4: $self$正拿着喷壶，均匀地给每一片叶子洒上水珠。
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Ongoing_5: $self$全神贯注地修剪着多余的枝叶，完全没有注意到时间的流逝。
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_1: $self$身体猛地一僵，手中的喷壶差点掉落。"对、对不起……我马上就弄完……"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_2: $self$下意识地缩起肩膀，试图用植物挡住自己的身体。"我……我没有偷懒……"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_3: $self$低着头不敢看对方，声音细若游丝。"请不要踩坏它们……"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_4: $self$手上的动作停顿了一下，并没有回头。"如果你是来找茬的，请离我的植物远点。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_5: $self$握紧了手中的铲子，眼神冰冷地瞥了一眼来人。"这里不欢迎你。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_6: $self$故意用力铲了一铲土，扬起的尘土向对方飘去。
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_7: $self$听到脚步声抬起头，露出了一个灿烂的笑容。"是你呀！快来看，这棵苗长得多好！"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_8: $self$擦了擦脸颊上的泥土，开心地招了招手。"哎呀，被你看到了脏兮兮的样子。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_9: $self$指着旁边的小板凳："坐这儿陪我聊会儿？正好我一个人有点闷。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_10: $self$缓缓直起腰，故意展示出被汗水浸湿的领口。"要在这种充满自然气息的地方……聊聊吗？"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_11: $self$咬着嘴唇，用一种湿漉漉的眼神看着对方。"一个人种花好累啊，能不能帮帮人家……"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_12: $self$借着擦汗的动作，让手套上的泥土蹭过锁骨。"哎呀，弄脏了呢……你要帮我擦掉吗？"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_13: $self$只是淡淡地点了点头算作打招呼，随即继续手中的活计。
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_14: $self$随口应了一句："正如你所见，在忙着呢。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_15: $self$瞥了一眼对方："借过一下，我要去那边拿水管。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_1: $self$摆了摆手笑道："我也很想去，但这会儿真的走不开，下次一定！"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_2: $self$抱歉地看着$target$："现在这太阳太毒了，我怕晒黑，晚点再说吧？"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_3: $self$皱起眉头，仿佛听到了什么笑话。"你是认真的吗？让我去玩泥巴？"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_4: $self$嫌弃地后退了一步。"没兴趣，别把那些脏东西带到我这里来。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_5: $self$看着破土而出的新芽，满脸都是成就感。"快看！它活了！我们成功了！"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_6: $self$小心翼翼地抚摸着翠绿的叶片，脸上洋溢着温柔的笑意。"这感觉真好，谢谢你陪我一起。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_7: 虽然植物种活了，$self$却疲惫地揉着腰。"虽然结果是好的，但这代价也太大了，下次再也不干了。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_8: $self$看着满手的泥污和断掉的指甲，叹了口气。"为了这点绿化牺牲这么多，真不知道值不值。"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_9: 虽然幼苗没能挺过第一晚，$self$却并不气馁。"至少我学到了不少经验，下次一定能行！"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_10: $self$看着枯萎的叶子苦笑了一下，随即拍了拍$target$的背。"没事啦，过程开心最重要嘛！"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_11: $self$看着死去植物，眼眶微微泛红。"怎么会这样……我明明那么用心了……"
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_12: $self$烦躁地把工具扔进箱子里。"浪费了两个小时，简直就是场灾难。"

en-us.kojo_default_com_job_farm_cultivate_crop: $self$: "Planting crops, huh... why don't you find someone more experienced to work with?"
$self$: "Planting crops together? Let's not do that, I'll probably be holding you back."
"isn't this seedling buried a little too shallow?" $self$ couldn't help but frown looking at the crooked seedling
"…whatever, let's just leave it like this, it'll grow just fine... hopefully." $self$ sighed, looking at the uneven field
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Begin_1: $self$'s eyes lit up, and she stood up immediately. "Sure! I've been wanting to try planting something!"
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Begin_2: $self$ excitedly rolled up her sleeves: "Let's go, I'll show you what I can do!"
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Begin_3: $self$'s face turned pale, and she nodded tremblingly. "I... I understand... I'll do as I'm told."
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Begin_4: $self$ didn't dare to resist, stiffly following behind. "Please don't be angry, I'm going."
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Begin_5: $self$ pointed at herself in surprise. "Eh? Me too? Well, since you invited me."
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Begin_6: $self$ hesitated for a moment but still took the tools. "I can't guarantee anything will grow, though."
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Begin_7: $self$ put on the soil-stained gloves and picked up the trowel, walking towards the empty plot.
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Begin_8: $self$ tore open the seed packet and carefully poured some into her palm to count them.
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Begin_9: $self$ took a deep breath of the garden soil's scent, rolling up her sleeves, ready to get to work.
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Begin_10: $self$ squatted down and tested the soil moisture with her fingers. "Hmm, today is a good day for planting."
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Begin_11: $self$ dragged the heavy fertilizer bag to her feet and clapped the dust off her hands.
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Tryjoin_1: $self$ looked at the busy $target$ and asked tentatively: "Um... do you need help? I want to try too."
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Tryjoin_2: $self$ leaned in with anticipation. "That looks fun, count me in?"
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Joined_1: $self$ happily took the shovel. "Awesome! I definitely won't slow you down!"
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Joined_2: $self$ immediately squatted down, full of energy. "Then I'll handle this area!"
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Join_Refused: $self$ dropped her shoulders in disappointment. "Ah... okay, can I at least watch from the side?"
$self$ withdrew her hand awkwardly. "Fine, if you don't want help, be that way."
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Join_1: $self$ smiled gratefully: "No need, I can handle it myself. Besides, this is something I wanted to do quietly on my own."
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Join_2: $self$ blocked the other's hand: "Careful not to dirty your clothes, just keeping me company is enough."
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Join_3: $self$ guardedly shielded her plot. "Don't touch! This is my experimental field, no outsiders allowed."
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Join_4: $self$ said coldly: "You'll just make things worse, stay away."
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Join_5: $self$ handed over a spare pair of gloves in surprise. "Just what I needed! It'll be much faster with two people!"
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Join_6: $self$ scooted over. "Here, you dig this hole!"
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Join_7: $self$ shrank back stiffly, not daring to voice any objection.
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Join_8: $self$ lowered her head and silently gave up her spot, eyes flickering with unease. "Whatever you want..."
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Join_9: $self$ paused, then shrugged. "If you insist... just don't complain about being tired."
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Join_10: $self$ offered half of her tools. "Then I'll leave some to you? It's actually quite boring."
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Ongoing_1: $self$ was intently loosening the compacted soil with a trowel, beads of sweat forming on her forehead.
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Ongoing_2: $self$ hummed an unknown tune while carefully transplanting seedlings into the dug holes.
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Ongoing_3: $self$ knelt on the soil, meticulously pulling out weeds with movements as gentle as petting a pet.
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Ongoing_4: $self$ was holding a watering can, evenly spraying water droplets on every leaf.
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Ongoing_5: $self$ was fully focused on trimming excess branches, completely unaware of the passing time.
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_1: $self$'s body stiffened, and she almost dropped the watering can. "S-sorry... I'll finish right away..."
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_2: $self$ subconsciously hunched her shoulders, trying to hide her body behind the plants. "I... I wasn't slacking off..."
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_3: $self$ lowered her head, afraid to look at the other person, her voice faint. "Please don't step on them..."
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_4: $self$ paused her movements but didn't look back. "If you're here to pick a fight, stay away from my plants."
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_5: $self$ gripped the shovel tighter, glancing coldly at the visitor. "You're not welcome here."
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_6: $self$ deliberately shoveled some soil hard, sending dust drifting towards the other person.
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_7: $self$ looked up at the sound of footsteps and flashed a bright smile. "It's you! Look, this seedling is growing so well!"
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_8: $self$ wiped the dirt off her cheek and waved happily. "Oh my, you caught me all dirty."
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_9: $self$ pointed to a small stool nearby: "Sit here and chat with me? It's a bit lonely by myself."
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_10: $self$ slowly straightened up, deliberately showing her sweat-soaked neckline. "Want to... have a chat in this nature-filled place?"
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_11: $self$ bit her lip, looking at the other person with moist eyes. "Planting flowers alone is so tiring, could you help me..."
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_12: $self$ used the motion of wiping sweat to let her dirty glove graze her collarbone. "Oops, I got dirty... will you help me wipe it off?"
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_13: $self$ simply nodded as a greeting, then continued with her work.
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_14: $self$ replied casually: "As you can see, I'm busy."
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_Interrupt_15: $self$ glanced at the other person: "Excuse me, I need to get the hose over there."
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_1: $self$ waved her hand and laughed: "I'd love to, but I really can't get away right now. Next time for sure!"
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_2: $self$ looked apologetically at $target$: "The sun is too harsh right now, I'm afraid of getting tanned. Maybe later?"
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_3: $self$ frowned, as if she heard a joke. "Are you serious? Asking me to play with mud?"
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_4: $self$ stepped back in disgust. "Not interested. Don't bring that filth near me."
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_5: $self$ looked at the sprouting buds with a face full of accomplishment. "Look! It's alive! We did it!"
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_6: $self$ carefully stroked the green leaves, a gentle smile on her face. "This feels great, thanks for joining me."
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_7: Although the plants survived, $self$ rubbed her waist wearily. "The result is good, but the cost was too high. Never doing this again."
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_8: $self$ looked at her mud-stained hands and broken nails, sighing. "I don't know if it's worth sacrificing so much for a bit of greenery."
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_9: Even though the seedlings didn't survive the first night, $self$ wasn't discouraged. "At least I learned a lot, next time will be better!"
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_10: $self$ smiled bitterly at the withered leaves, then patted $target$ on the back. "It's okay, having fun in the process is what matters!"
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_11: $self$ looked at the dead plant, her eyes turning slightly red. "How could this happen... I tried so hard..."
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_12: $self$ irritably threw the tools into the box. "Wasted two hours, what a disaster."
